rule_metadata.name: WhiskeyDelta
rule_metadata.author: Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group  trig@novetta.com

rules.rule_text:
import "pe"

rule WhiskeyDelta
{
	meta:
		copyright = "2015 Novetta Solutions"
		author = "Novetta Threat Research & Interdiction Group  trig@novetta.com"
		Source = "41badf10ef6f469dd1c3be201aba809f9c42f86ad77d7f83bc3895bfa289c635"

	strings:
		$decryption = {
			F3 A5 
			8B 7C 24 30 
			85 FF 
			7E ?? 
			8B 74 24 2C 
			8A 44 24 08 
			53 
			8A 4C 24 21 
			8A 5C 24 2B 
			32 C1 
			8A 0C 32 
			32 C3 
			32 C8 
			88 0C 32 
			B9 1E 00 00 00 
			8A 5C 0C 0C 
			88 5C 0C 0D 
			49 
			83 F9 FF 
			7F ?? 
			42 
		}
		$s1 = "=====IsFile=====" wide
		$s2 = "=====4M=====" wide
		$s3 = "=====IsBackup=====" wide

	condition:
		2 of ( $s* ) or $decryption in ( ( pe.sections [ pe.section_index ( ".text" ) ] . raw_data_offset ) .. ( pe.sections [ pe.section_index ( ".text" ) ] . raw_data_offset + pe.sections [ pe.section_index ( ".text" ) ] . raw_data_size ) )
}
